stages.label: Pracharaka Onboarding
stages.description: Enroll and verify referral partners (Pracharakas) who identify and refer prospective patients.

stages.label: Wish List Creation
stages.description: Patient expresses interest and is added to the Panchakarma wish list for initial assessment.

stages.label: Astro-Eligibility Assessment
stages.description: Evaluate patient eligibility based on astrological and constitutional factors per Ayurvedic principles.

stages.label: Medical Screening
stages.description: Comprehensive medical review of patient history, conditions, and contraindications.

stages.label: Treatment Planning
stages.description: Ayurveda doctor formulates personalised Panchakarma treatment protocol.

stages.label: Panchakarma Consultation
stages.description: Detailed consultation with the patient to finalise the treatment plan and answer questions.

stages.label: Reservation & Orientation
stages.description: Confirm program dates, accommodation, and provide pre-arrival orientation kit.

stages.label: Patient Portal Onboarding
stages.description: Set up patient's secure portal access for documents, communications and pre-program forms.

stages.label: Travel & Payment Confirmation
stages.description: Confirm travel arrangements and collect program fees per the payment schedule.

stages.label: Arrival & Admission
stages.description: Patient arrives at the Panchakarma centre; formal admission and initial assessment completed.

stages.label: Document Management
stages.description: Centralised document repository for consents, reports, prescriptions and correspondence.

stages.label: Quality Control
stages.description: Post-program quality review, feedback collection and outcome recording.
